step.title: Validate and Complete
step.goal: Run validation on the completed command files and present next steps.

substep.title: Run Validation
substep.note: This is a quick author-side pre-check. The build-authoritative validator is `vera validate` (collisions, duplicate ids, template syntax, manifest). Run it too.

check.action: Address each error: - Missing required config fields → Add them - Invalid id format → Fix format - Missing description in instructions.md frontmatter → Add it
check.ask: Validation found issues. Would you like to: [f] Fix issues and re-validate [i] Ignore and continue (not recommended)

substep.title: Review Complete Command
Present Next Steps
substep.output:
## Next Steps
1. **Register it in the manifest** so it builds: add the command-config.yaml path to a build group in .vera/vera.manifest.yaml (global commands can live in a `commands` group).
2. **Build the command:** ```bash vera build {{build_group}} ```
3. **Output location:** {{#if agent_specific}} ~/.config/opencode/command/{{owner_agent}}/{{command_name}}.md {{/if}} {{#unless agent_specific}} ~/.config/opencode/command/{{command_name}}.md {{/unless}}
4. **Test the command:** ``` /{{command_name}} [test arguments] ```
5. **Iterate:** - If behavior isn't right, edit instructions.md - Rebuild and retest (remove the compiled artifact first if a plain rebuild doesn't pick up attachment changes)

section.title: Validation Checks
section.description: The validation script checks for common issues.

checks.check: - type: must equal "command" - id: must exist, lowercase-hyphen format - file_name: must exist, end with .md - destination: must exist ("." for global, or an agent name) - includes: must exist; every included file must exist
- description: must exist, non-empty, not a TODO placeholder
- If the body uses <command>, it should contain an <instructions> block

issue.name: id format error
issue.fix: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens

issue.name: Missing description
issue.symptom: instructions.md frontmatter has no description (or still TODO)
issue.fix: Add a clear, actionable description starting with a verb

issue.name: Legacy fields in config
issue.fix: Move them — identity lives in the instructions.md frontmatter

issue.name: Include not found
issue.fix: Create the file or fix the path in includes

section.title: Build Process
section.description: The build tool compiles source files into the final command:
section.process:
Source: command-config.yaml (build descriptor) instructions.md (frontmatter + body)
↓ Build: vera build {{build_group}} (the group it's registered under)
Output: {{command_name}}.md - YAML frontmatter (from instructions.md frontmatter) - Body (from instructions.md body, variables swapped)
